title: indigofera tephrosioides
intro: Indigofera tephrosioides, also known as King of Bitters, is a plant species in the legume family, native to India and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter and astringent qualities, which are said to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Indigofera tephrosioides can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be used to support digestive health and overall well-being.
